meta.title: Universal Shard Schema
meta.description: Every object in the Athena organism is a shard — the fundamental unit of identity, lineage, and routing across all mediums.

required_fields.medium: enum: code | json | doc | markdown | git | mcp
required_fields.lens: str | null — primary SFCR affinity (S, F, C, R, or null for universal)
required_fields.payload_ref: str — relative path or URI to actual content
required_fields.seed_vector: list[float] — 4-element SFCR weight vector [s, f, c, r]
required_fields.route_refs: list[str] — shard_ids this shard routes to
required_fields.cert_refs: list[str] — shard_ids of certs that validate this shard
required_fields.mirror_refs: list[str] — shard_ids in other mediums that mirror this content
required_fields.truth_status: enum: SEED | DRAFT | WITNESSED | CERTIFIED | CANONICAL
required_fields.promotion_status: enum: LOCAL | PROPOSED | REVIEWED | PROMOTED | ARCHIVED

truth_status_ladder.CERTIFIED: All required certs present and valid
truth_status_ladder.CANONICAL: Promoted to authoritative status across the organism

promotion_status_ladder.REVIEWED: At least one certifying edge exists
